actions.reason: Same physical NDPHC NIPP plant (561MW, Cross River, Odukpani LGA). Canonical name per NERC Q1 2025.
Misnamed duplicate of Kaduna Mando 330kV. Kumbotso is in Kano, not Kaduna.
